content: mulberry32: best 32-bit state JS PRNG for deterministic procedural generation. Passes gjrand. Period ~4 billion (2^32). Implementation identical to mock. For 128-bit state quality, sfc32 is best (passes PractRand). xoshiro128** has known weaknesses in lower bits. xoshiro128+ fails statistical tests for linearity. Recommendation: mulberry32 for per-ring seeds (32-bit seed from hash(subId, day, genomeVersion)) — already used in mock, no change needed. sfc32 if extra quality needed.
